exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group presentation(cloud)[Presentation Layer]
    group application(cloud)[Application Layer]
    group data(cloud)[Data Layer]
    group analytics(cloud)[Analytics Layer]
    group orchestration(cloud)[Orchestration Layer]

    service s3(aws:s3)[S3 Bucket] in data
    service azurefunc(azure:functions)[Azure Functions] in application
    service bigquery(gcp:bigquery)[BigQuery] in analytics
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Kubernetes] in orchestration

    service app1(azure:app-service)[App Service] in application
    service app2(gcp:cloud-run)[Cloud Run] in application
    service db(azure:sql-database)[SQL Database] in data

    app1:R -- L:azurefunc
    app2:R -- L:azurefunc
    azurefunc:B -- T:s3
    azurefunc:R -- L:bigquery
    k8s:T -- B:app1
    k8s:T -- B:app2
    k8s:T -- B:azurefunc
    k8s:R -- L:db
    db:R -- L:s3
